title: EPIL Notification 2026 - Apply for Graduate Apprentice Posts
description: Engineering Projects (India) Limited has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Graduate Apprentice Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the EPIL Recruitment 2026 . Here, we mentioned the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and elig...
